title: Yahir-dad addiction arc

Stub. Multi-year arc tracking Yahir's relationship with his father's alcoholism — surfaces explicitly in the Jan 2023 thoughts-and-things entries and the 2023 Al Forthan essay. See alcoholism in the family for the broader concept and dad yahir for the person.
